{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Eithan's Presence
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan's Presence]] is a mental copy of himself brought to [[life]] with independence.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan's Presence]] is a six-inch tall figure with long blond hair and colorful outer robes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
